workflow.name: Create an Ambient Soundscape
workflow.description: Set up a layered ambient audio environment with background music, environmental sounds with attenuation, and randomized ambient sound cues.

steps.purpose: Import ambient audio files if not already in the project
List available audio assets to select from
Create a Sound Cue with random variation for ambient loops
Configure 3D attenuation settings for spatial audio falloff
Spawn an AmbientSound actor for background music (2D, no attenuation)
Spawn AmbientSound actors at key positions for environmental sounds
Set volume multiplier and auto-activate on each sound actor
Save the level with audio setup

workflow.expectedOutcome: A layered ambient soundscape with background music, spatialized environmental sounds, and randomized audio cues
